transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Riverbend Clinic scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. It's currently next Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, I heard you say you'd like to reschedule your Tuesday appointment with Dr. Alvarez. What day would you prefer instead?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe sometime the following week, like Wednesday or Thursday afternoon.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, Wednesday or Thursday afternoon the following week works. Let me check availability. Dr. Alvarez has an opening Thursday at 2:15pm. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I have you confirmed for Thursday at 2:15pm with Dr. Alvarez. Can I get your date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, I've confirmed your file with that date of birth, March 4th, 1989. Your new appointment is set for Thursday at 2:15pm.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. You'll get a text confirmation shortly. Have a great day!
